title: Telugu voice booking — Smile Dental
note: Two-pane demo fixture. The CALL-side Telugu is REAL Sarvam STT + REAL brain output — never hand-typed or edited. See `provenance`.

call.speaker: caller
call.text: హాయ్, నాకు అపాయింట్మెంట్ బుక్ చేద్దామని ఉంది. డాక్టర్ ఎప్పుడు అవైలబుల్ గా ఉన్నారు రేపు?
call.english_gloss: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment. When is the doctor available tomorrow?

call.speaker: ai
call.text: నమస్తే! రేపు, అంటే శనివారం, డాక్టర్ రావు ఉదయం 9 గంటల నుండి సాయంత్రం 5:30 వరకు అందుబాటులో ఉన్నారు. మీకు ఏ సమయం కావాలి?
call.english_gloss: Namaste! Tomorrow — Saturday — Dr. Rao is available from 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM. What time would you like?

whatsapp.text: Hi Sravani, this is Smile Dental. Your appointment with Dr. Rao is confirmed for tomorrow, Sat 18 Jul, at 9:00 AM. Reply CANCEL to cancel.
Reminder: your appointment with Dr. Rao is today at 9:00 AM. See you soon!

provenance.caller_transcript: REAL. Sarvam Saaras STT output (model=saaras:v3, mode=transcribe, language_code=unknown → detected te-IN, probability 1.0) on founder-recorded audio demo-audio/booking.wav, captured 2026-07-17 via scripts/demo/capture_stt.py. Verbatim, never edited. This is the SAME model+mode the live voice worker uses (voice-agent/agent.py, livekit-plugins-sarvam). Sarvam request_id 20260717_006a8c12-8ef0-4748-8908-6523130c107f.
provenance.ai_reply: REAL. Output of aiService.generateReply(channel='voice') — the same brain the voice route runs — on the transcript above, against tenant 'Smile Dental (Voice Dev)'. One Gemini turn: the model called check_availability(date=2026-07-18) then answered in Telugu. Verbatim, never edited. Captured via scripts/demo/capture_turn.js.
provenance.appointment: REAL appointments row (id 8667b5bc-6509-46df-bf30-051478bd4a95), booked via appointmentService.bookAppointment at the first offered slot for Dr. Rao tomorrow (09:00 IST, 2026-07-18). Per the DEMO-00 decision it was booked PROGRAMMATICALLY (not brain-driven), because the founder's single utterance was an availability question and a brain-driven booking needs ≥2 caller turns (confirm-first-book-second). The synthetic patient + this row were then purged from the dev DB (residue verified 0); the values above are what the row held at capture time.
provenance.whatsapp: HAND-AUTHORED English for the same patient. Only the CALL side is required to be STT-captured; the WhatsApp side is illustrative.
provenance.english_gloss: Translations of the Telugu call lines, for display/reviewers only. The authoritative call text is the Telugu `text` field.
